Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (qualifying environmental trust)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (qualifying environmental trust)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to include, in the definition 芒聙聹qualifying environmental trust芒聙聺, trusts that are maintained for the sole purpose of funding the reclamation of an oil or gas well operated for the purpose of producing petroleum or natural gas.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Subsection.Text: Paragraph (a) of the definition excluded trust in subsection 211.6(1) of the Income Tax Act is repealed.

The definition qualifying site in subsection 211.6(1) of the Act is amended by striking out 芒聙聹or芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (c), by adding 芒聙聹or芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (d) and by adding the following after paragraph (d):

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: the operation of an oil or gas well drilled for the purpose of producing petroleum or natural gas.

Subsection.Text: Subsections (1) and (2) apply to the 2020 and subsequent taxation years.
